channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: During the first week of March, Tesla sold more cars in Norway than all its competitors combined, ac...
item.description: During the first week of March, Tesla sold more cars in Norway than all its competitors combined, achieving a market share of 53.4%. This was also Tesla's best March ever. 🇳🇴

item.title: @elonmusk: Another 𝕏 peak usage record this week

item.description: Design your own agents with Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: 1 image, no prompt, 2 extensions, 30 seconds. I let Grok Imagine imagine things... and Wow! 🤯
item.description: 1 image, no prompt, 2 extensions, 30 seconds. I let Grok Imagine imagine things... and Wow! 🤯

item.title: @elonmusk: Articles are growing fast. Grok summary of articles coming to improve rate of information consumptio...
item.description: Articles are growing fast. Grok summary of articles coming to improve rate of information consumption.

item.title: @elonmusk: Either incarcerate or innocent people suffer
item.description: Either incarcerate or innocent people suffer

item.title: @elonmusk: Gutenberg invented the most important technology of the millennium and immediately went bankrupt — a...
item.description: Gutenberg invented the most important technology of the millennium and immediately went bankrupt — and so did the bank that foreclosed on him, and so did his apprentices. Gutenberg could make a batch of 300 books for the cost of one, but there weren't enough buyers in his small, landlocked village in Germany. It it took the better part of a century of further innovations, social changes, and setting up of distribution networks before you could have a pamphlet like Luther's 95 thesis get from Wittenberg to London in 17 days.

item.title: @elonmusk: Unreal numbers 👀⚡️ "JPMorgan estimates that, had Germany not phased out nuclear power, the country w...
item.description: Unreal numbers 👀⚡️ "JPMorgan estimates that, had Germany not phased out nuclear power, the country would have generated 50% less electricity from fossil fuels and 84% less electricity from natural gas in 2024. Electricity prices in Germany would have been around 25% lower, and the country would have imported half as much electricity.."

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
